driveRawFolder.name: Raw Films
driveRawFolder.note: Tai drops raw phone clips here. In cloud sessions Claude fetches them into rawDir; on a local machine point rawDir at the Google Drive for Desktop synced folder instead.

grade.note: One gentle warm grade, identical on every film. Slight lift in shadows, warmth up, saturation modest.

captions.note: Burned in, bottom center, cream on 55 percent navy strip, serif, max 2 lines, no word-by-word pop. Keep the spoken language. Hebrew verse: Hebrew first line, English in parentheses on the second.

editingGrammar.law: Keep breath, pauses before important lines, and imperfections. The stumbles are the voice. No whip cuts, no beat-synced editing, no meme grammar. Slow down at the Scripture turn and show the land, not his face. Never pad.

whisper.note: Never translate inside captions. Model download needs huggingface.co (faster-whisper) or openaipublic.azureedge.net (openai-whisper) reachable from the session.
